hero.label: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.title: Our Guide To Your Frequently Asked Questions
hero.description: Find quick answers to your questions below, or reach out to our support team for more help!

sections.description: Covers the basics of MIRYA, its purpose, sign-up process Free Trial, and available resources.

questions.question: What is MIRYA and how can it help my business?
questions.answer: MIRYA is a no-code automation platform that allows you to record, build, and run process automations — without programming knowledge.

questions.question: Who can use MIRYA?
questions.answer: MIRYA is designed for businesses of all sizes, from startups to enterprises.

questions.question: Can you setup the first process for us?
questions.answer: Yes! Our team can help you set up your first automation process.

questions.question: How long does it take to get started?
questions.answer: You can get started with MIRYA in minutes.

sections.description: Includes information on features in the Free Trial, plan flexibility, and compatibility with other software.

questions.question: How does the subscription work?
questions.answer: Choose the plan that fits your needs and upgrade or downgrade anytime.

questions.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
Is MIRYA compatible with other softwares?
questions.answer: MIRYA integrates seamlessly with most popular business applications.

questions.question: What is the white label option and who is it for?
questions.answer: White label allows you to rebrand MIRYA as your own product.

sections.description: Outlines security measures such as data encryption and backup practices to ensure user safety.

questions.question: How secure is my data with MIRYA?
questions.answer: MIRYA uses enterprise-grade security and encryption.

questions.question: Does MIRYA encrypt my information?
questions.answer: Yes, data is encrypted both in transit and at rest.

questions.question: Do you create backups of my data?
Who can access my data inside MIRYA?
questions.answer: Only authorized personnel with role-based permissions.

sections.description: Details support options, including self-help resources and contact methods.

questions.question: What support options does MIRYA offer?
questions.answer: 24/7 email support, live chat, and help center.

questions.question: How quickly can I get help?
questions.answer: Typically under 10 minutes via live chat.

questions.question: Is there a dedicated support team?
questions.answer: Yes, premium users receive priority support.

questions.question: Do you offer onboarding or training?
questions.answer: Yes, guided onboarding and documentation are available.
